---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a module or pipeline in the WILDS WDL Library
---

## Bug Description

**Which module or pipeline has the issue?**

<!-- e.g., ww-bwa, ww-rnaseq-basic, etc. -->

**What version are you using?**

<!-- e.g., commit hash, release tag, or "latest from main" -->

**What went wrong?**

<!-- Describe what happened. Include error messages if you have them. -->

**What did you expect to happen?**

<!-- Describe what you thought should happen instead. -->

## How to Reproduce

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

<!--
1. I ran this command: ...
2. With these inputs: ...
3. And got this error: ...
-->

**Input files/data:**

<!-- Describe your input files (type, size, source). You don't need to share the actual files unless asked. -->

## Additional Context

**Anything else that might be helpful?**

<!-- System info, screenshots, logs, etc. -->
